Home.heroDesc: Providing a world-class education rooted in the philosophy of Sankofa—reaching back to fetch what is valuable to build a better future in the heart of Hawassa.

About.title: About Sankofa
About.missionText: To cultivate a community of lifelong learners who lead with integrity, rooted in Ethiopian heritage while meeting global academic standards.
About.visionText: To be the premier international school in the Sidama Region, empowering the next generation of global innovators.

Academics.title: Academic Excellence
Academics.subtitle: A curriculum designed for the future.
Academics.stemText: State-of-the-art laboratories and a forward-thinking science program.
Academics.artsText: Fostering creativity and critical thinking through comprehensive arts education.

Footer.schoolDesc: Committed to providing an uncompromising international academic standard, deeply rooted in the moral core of our Ethiopian heritage.
